---
title: "Performance Engineering in Practice"
subtitle: "Algorithm Engineering — T01"
author: Dr. Dominik Krupke
format:
  revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    width: 1600
    height: 900
    chalkboard:
      buttons: false
    preview-links: auto
    css: styles.css
    footer: "Algorithm Engineering SS 2026 — T01 Performance Engineering"
    progress: true
    theme: dark
    highlight-style: github
    code-overflow: wrap
bibliography: references.bib
---

{{< include _00-intro.qmd >}}

{{< include _01-amdahl.qmd >}}

{{< include _02-logging.qmd >}}

{{< include _03-profiling.qmd >}}

{{< include _04-benchmarking.qmd >}}

{{< include _05-python-killers.qmd >}}

{{< include _06-pybind11.qmd >}}

{{< include _07-cpp-killers.qmd >}}

{{< include _08-wrap-up.qmd >}}

## References
